_description: Organize Media Rules - Configures how torrent-style filenames are cleaned and organized

movie_name._comment: Rules for cleaning movie filenames. Applies normalize → strip brackets → cutoff quality tags → regex cleanup
movie_name._normalize_separators_comment: Convert dots, underscores, and hyphens to spaces (e.g., 'Movie.Title' → 'Movie Title')
movie_name._strip_bracketed_comment: Remove text in brackets [like this], parentheses (like this), and braces {like this}
movie_name._cutoff_tokens_comment: List of regex patterns for torrent quality/codec tags. Everything from the FIRST match onwards is removed (stops at first regex match). Examples: 1080p, WEB-DL, x264, released groups (YTS, RARBG, etc)

cleanup_regex._comment: Replace consecutive hyphens/underscores with single space

movie_name._cleanup_regex_comment: Array of pattern/replace pairs applied as final step. Use regex patterns to fix remaining formatting issues

tv_name._comment: Rules for cleaning TV episode filenames. Applies normalize → strip brackets → cutoff quality tags → episode extraction → template rendering
tv_name._template_comment: Final output format. Use {clean_name} for show title, {season} for season number, {episode} for episode number, {season_episode} for 'S##E##' format
tv_name._normalize_separators_comment: Convert dots, underscores, and hyphens to spaces (e.g., 'Show.Name' → 'Show Name')
tv_name._strip_bracketed_comment: Remove text in brackets [like this], parentheses (like this), and braces {like this}

patterns._comment: Matches 'Season N Episode M' format (case-insensitive, allows separators). Examples: Season 1 Episode 2, Season.1.Episode.2

tv_name._patterns_comment: Array of regex patterns to extract season/episode numbers. First matching pattern wins. Each must have named groups: (?P<season>...) and (?P<episode>...)
tv_name._cutoff_tokens_comment: List of regex patterns for torrent quality/codec tags. Everything from the FIRST match onwards is removed. Examples: 1080p, WEB-DL, x264, released groups (YTS, RARBG, etc)

cleanup_regex._comment: Replace consecutive hyphens/underscores with single space

tv_name._cleanup_regex_comment: Array of pattern/replace pairs applied AFTER quality tag removal but BEFORE episode extraction. Use regex patterns to fix remaining formatting
